CommunityApplications.Profile:
Plex Streams — Unraid plugin that adds a dashboard widget and sidebar entry showing currently active Plex Media Server streams: title, user, server, location (with country flag), playback position, transcode type (HW/CPU), bandwidth and optional poster art. One-click expand for full per-stream details; optional one-click terminate.
Fork of [dorgan/Unraid-plexstreams](https://github.com/dorgan/Unraid-plexstreams) with bug fixes, server-side caching, a modernized dashboard widget, opt-in stream termination, and a GitHub Actions pipeline that auto-builds the `.txz` package.
**Support:** [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/loukaniko85/unraid-plexstreams/issues)
